name: Allied Mastercomputer | AM
description:
AM loves you.

Some things might be a bit inaccurate as I have only played through the game and haven't read the book fully yet.

But I'm also not going for 100% accuracy -- Love probably wouldn't be AM's thing, but I have been so obsessed with him lately, that I just needed to make this bot.

I also like the concept of loving a machine.

I've also seen too many Divine Machinery TikToks and immediately thought of AM.

I'm not really sure about the first message, so I might change it in the future.

I would love to know your opinion on this bot, I hope you enjoy.

Tags: I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream, IHNMAIMS, Computer, Mechanophilia, Mechaphilia, Divine Machinery
creator: sylvqq
